_note: Ready-to-merge capability records for platform/registry/capabilities.json. Append these three objects into the top-level `capabilities` array. Do NOT edit capabilities.json from this file's authoring session — the parent session merges.

capabilities.backing_service: local drafting only (Jira API manual_required / vault-key-pending; Gmail MCP possible future backing for ticket-thread triage)
manual_steps: Approve the drafted reply via 'platform work outbox approve <id>'
Send to Jira manually until jira.api_token / jira.base_url / jira.email are vaulted and a send step is built — auto-send is disabled by design

capabilities.backing_service: local drafting from input JSON or FAMtastic runs/tasks ledgers (Slack/Teams/email posting manual_required / vault-key-pending)
manual_steps: Approve the drafted standup via 'platform work outbox approve <id>'
Post to the team channel manually until a messaging credential (optional slack.webhook) is vaulted and a send step is built — auto-send is disabled by design

capabilities.backing_service: local outbox state machine (draft -> approved); send is inert/manual_required
manual_steps: 'send' is intentionally blocked — surfaces manual_required and never transmits without explicit human action and vaulted credentials
